title: Home vs House: What's the Difference and When to Use Them?
content: HomevsHouseEnglish learners often get confused between the wordshomeandhouse. At first, they may look the same because both refer to places where people live. But in reality, they carry different meanings and uses. Let's break it down in a simple way. 1.House= The Building Ahouseis a physical structure — the walls, roof, doors, and rooms.
